chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Appl. No.46 of 2025. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ For hearing of bail application. 02.05.2025. Mr. Samiullah Soomro, Advocate for the applicant a/w applicant present on bail. Mr. Javed Ahmed Rajput, Advocate for complainant a/w complainant. Ms. Rahat Ehsan, Addl. P.G. Sindh. ************ Applicant Muhammad Baber seeks pre-arrest bail in case bearing crime No.283/2024 offence U/S 489-F PPC of P.S. Paposh Nagar, Karachi. His bail plea was declined by the Court of learned Additional Sessions Judge VIth Karachi Central vide order dated 04.01.2024. Since, offence under Section 489-F PPC is compoundable. The parties have patched up and resolved their matter amicably. In this regard, they placed an affidavit duly signed by both the parties, same is taken on record. As per affidavit of compromise an amount of Rs.3,580,000/- is outstanding against the accused, whereby he will deposit Rs.150,000/- before the learned trial Court on or before 10th of each calendar month commencing from June, 2025 till completion of entire outstanding amount. In case of failure, the trial Court shall be at liberty to dismiss the bail of the applicant. Therefore, applicant has succeeded to make out case for bail on the basis of compromise. Accordingly, Interim bail already granted to him is confirmed on same terms and conditions with the directions to join investigation/trial. JUDGE Shahbaz
